message:
style(tests): replace panic!() with unreachable!() in test assertions

Replace unwrap_or_else(|| panic!(...)) with unwrap_or_else(|| unreachable!(...))
across provider metadata and model tests, and bare panic!() with
unreachable!() in scheduler test match arms. The unreachable!() macro
better communicates intent for code paths that should never execute,
distinguishing "this is structurally impossible" from "this is a test
failure" which is already handled by assert macros.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
